record.summary: Moves stamping logic from "factory-side folklore" into the template itself: a scaffold verb the factory (or a human) invokes inside a fresh clone of this repo to turn it into a named app. Slot substitution, lockfile discipline, registry regeneration, and certificate placement all live in one script with one contract entry. Absorption line item LI-4 of spec 010; fills the scaffold verb reserved by spec 009 §3.2 and bumps the contract to 0.3.0.
record.title: In-template scaffold verb + repoInit seeding (LI-4)
